# BAP Web

BAP Web is a Go + HTMX control plane for Firecracker microVMs.

## Agent Resources

- Agent guide: /docs/agents.md
- OpenAPI specification: /openapi.json
- Swagger UI: /docs/api
- API health check: /api/health

## Authentication

Operational APIs require authentication. Agents should use an API token supplied by the user or administrator:

Authorization: Bearer bap_...

Agents should not expect unauthenticated operational access and should not ask BAP Web to generate a token unless the user has already authenticated as an admin and explicitly requested token creation.
